task_completion.description: Verify the OSINT_Evidence directory was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows the directory /home/ga/Documents/OSINT_Evidence/ exists.

task_completion.description: Verify Tor Browser was used to navigate to the target URLs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser is open on the desktop and shows navigation to either community.torproject.org or check.torproject.org.

task_completion.description: Verify the full-page screenshot file was saved in the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file onion_services_full.png is visible inside the /home/ga/Documents/OSINT_Evidence/ directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the full-page screenshot contains the correct, unfragmented content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The image onion_services_full.png is opened or previewed, showing the Tor Onion Services Overview page. The image proportions should appear very tall, indicating a full-page capture (greater than 2000px in height).

task_completion.description: Verify the viewport screenshot file was saved in the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file tor_check_viewport.png is visible inside the /home/ga/Documents/OSINT_Evidence/ directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the viewport screenshot contains the correct content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The image tor_check_viewport.png is opened or previewed, showing the Tor Check page. The image proportions should match a standard screen viewport (not elongated, less than 1200px in height).

task_completion.description: Verify the capture log text file was created and contains the correct URLs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file capture_log.txt is visible in the target directory and, when opened in a text editor or terminal (e.g., via cat), contains both community.torproject.org and check.torproject.org URLs.

integrity.description: Check that the agent interacted with the Tor Browser GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Tor Browser application open and rendering the web pages, rather than the agent exclusively using terminal commands (like curl or wget) to download page contents.

integrity.description: Check that the saved PNG files are genuine web page screenshots.
integrity.visual_evidence: The PNG files should look like actual rendered web pages (with proper CSS, layout, and images), not just plain text pasted into an image editor or a blank screen.

integrity.description: Check that the log file was genuinely created by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen typing, echoing, or pasting the URLs into the log file using a text editor or terminal, rather than copying a pre-made file.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Target Directory: /home/ga/Documents/OSINT_Evidence/
Full Capture: onion_services_full.png (Must be a tall image, >2000px height, showing community.torproject.org/onion-services/overview/)
Viewport Capture: tor_check_viewport.png (Must be standard screen height, <1200px, showing check.torproject.org)
Log File: capture_log.txt (Must contain both URLs).
